name: Toasted Pecan-Mushroom Pate
recipeIngredient: 1 Red bell pepper, roasted and coarsely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. With the food processor running, drop ginger and chilies through the feed tube and mince them.
3. Add bread and pulse until reduced to crumbs.
4. Add mushrooms and toasted pecans and puree.
5. Add tofu, salt, and lemon juice and blend well.
6. Add cilantro and red pepper and pulse until the peppers are finely chopped.
7. Place in an oiled 2-cup loaf pan and bake for 1 hour.
8. Serve warm or at room temperature.
